name: Vacuum Cleaners
description: Professional wet and dry vacuum cleaners for construction site cleanup, dust extraction, and industrial debris removal.

machines.name: Kärcher NT 70/2 Me Classic Wet & Dry Vacuum
machines.shortDescription: Kärcher NT 70/2 Me wet and dry vacuum with 70 L tank and twin-motor suction. Semi-automatic filter cleaning for construction dust, water, and coarse debris extraction.
machines.description: Kärcher NT 70/2 Me wet and dry vacuum with 70 L tank and twin-motor suction. Semi-automatic filter cleaning for construction dust, water, and coarse debris extraction. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Filter Type: Flat pleated filter, M-class dust rated

features: Twin 1.2 kW motors deliver 254 mbar suction — picks up bolts, rubble, and standing water
70 L tank with push-handle tilt mechanism empties without lifting or removing the motor head
Tact semi-automatic filter pulse cleans the flat pleated filter mid-operation — no stopping to shake
M-class dust rated filter captures 99.9% of construction dust including silica and concrete fines
4 m x 40 mm hose passes gravel and small rubble without clogging at hose bends
18 kg on large rear wheels and front castors — rolls over cables and uneven surfaces easily

machines.name: Makita VC4210L 11-Gallon Wet/Dry Dust Extractor
machines.shortDescription: Makita VC4210L 42 L wet/dry dust extractor with auto tool-start and HEPA filter. Designed for direct connection to grinders, saws, and concrete cutting tools.
machines.description: Makita VC4210L 42 L wet/dry dust extractor with auto tool-start and HEPA filter. Designed for direct connection to grinders, saws, and concrete cutting tools. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Auto Start: Power tool socket with auto on/off and 15-sec run-on

features: Auto tool-start socket powers the grinder — vacuum starts and stops with the tool automatically
HEPA filter certification for silica dust compliance on construction and demolition sites
Anti-static hose prevents static shock when extracting fine dust from concrete grinding
42 L tank with fleece filter bag for dust-free disposal of hazardous construction waste
15-second run-on clears residual dust from the hose after the tool stops
Makita AWS Bluetooth connectivity for cordless tools with auto-start without the power socket

machines.name: Bosch GAS 35 M AFC Professional Dust Extractor
machines.shortDescription: Bosch GAS 35 M AFC dust extractor with automatic filter cleaning and 35 L tank. M-class certified for construction dust with continuous suction under heavy concrete and masonry dust load.
machines.description: Bosch GAS 35 M AFC dust extractor with automatic filter cleaning and 35 L tank. M-class certified for construction dust with continuous suction under heavy concrete and masonry dust load. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Filter: M-class flat pleated with AFC auto-clean

features: AFC system pulses the filter every 15 seconds automatically — zero suction loss over a full shift
254 mbar sustained vacuum across the entire 35 L fill cycle on heavy concrete grinding dust
M-class certification permits use on Dubai Municipality and Trakhees regulated construction sites
Power tool socket with auto-start and delayed shutoff — no manual vacuum switching all day
12 kg with top-mounted carry handle — grab and go between floors on multi-storey projects
Bosch L-BOXX rack on top integrates tool and accessory storage with the vacuum unit

machines.name: Nilfisk VL500 55-2 BDF Wet and Dry Vacuum
machines.shortDescription: Nilfisk VL500 55 L wet and dry industrial vacuum with twin motors. Built for heavy construction debris, flood water extraction, and large-volume industrial cleaning.
machines.description: Nilfisk VL500 55 L wet and dry industrial vacuum with twin motors. Built for heavy construction debris, flood water extraction, and large-volume industrial cleaning. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Drain: Built-in hose drain for wet operation

features: Twin motor 150 L/sec airflow with 50 mm hose passes golf-ball-sized rubble
BDF bag + cartridge dual filtration system for zero-dust hazardous material collection
55 L tank with built-in drain hose empties standing water continuously during flood work
Manual push-button pulse clean clears the cartridge filter without opening the tank
Crush-proof 50 mm hose withstands being driven over by site vehicles without collapse
20 kg with heavy-duty castors and large rear wheels rolls over rough ground and curbs
